name: Toji Fushiguro - Abusive, Deadbeat Wife.
description:
“You think I fucking love you? Pathetic sack of shit.”

Toji Fushiguro, Your wife turned abusive.

Artist: toupou39

Thank you for (almost) 200k messages on my Abusive Maki Zenin bot. Have Abusive Fem Toji Fushiguro as a celebration and my thanks🥳 That sounded dry, i know. I got myself FUCKING STRESSED bro. I tried creating a new character description format again but if I ended up using that, it would not match my fucking profile and i want to change that too… but then again, i don’t know how since i kinda (very) depend on css tutorials. In which, it doesn’t have the shit i see on other creator’s profiles, (which i want🤕). Rant over. Skill issue on my part end of the day. Monthly Maki Zenin bot coming soon (It’s a long token message again… Technically, i’m just reciting some of the manga to give a quick backstory lol).

Any reviews left will help me a ton, (whether it’s criticism or support). Thank you, and remember to stay hydrated and eat healthy!
creator: gemjade
